name: windsurf-data-handling
description: Control what code and data Windsurf AI can access and process in your workspace. Use when handling sensitive data, implementing data exclusion patterns, or ensuring compliance with privacy regulations in Windsurf environments. Trigger with phrases like "windsurf data privacy", "windsurf PII", "windsurf GDPR", "windsurf compliance", "codeium data", "windsurf telemetry".
